mapper.select: SELECT SNAPSHOT_KEY AS snapshotKey, SNAPSHOT_JSON AS snapshotJson, SNAPSHOT_TYPE AS snapshotType, TO_CHAR(SOURCE_UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sourceUpdatedAt, TO_CHAR(LAST_COMPUTED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastComputedAt, USE_AT AS useAt FROM COMTNADMINSUMMARYSNAPSHOT WHERE SNAPSHOT_KEY = #{_parameter} AND COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNADMINSUMMARYSNAPSHOT ( SNAPSHOT_KEY, SNAPSHOT_JSON, SNAPSHOT_TYPE, SOURCE_UPDATED_AT, LAST_COMPUTED_AT, USE_AT ) VALUES ( #{snapshotKey}, #{snapshotJson}, #{snapshotType}, CASE WHEN #{sourceUpdatedAt} IS NULL OR #{sourceUpdatedAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{sourceUpdatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, CURRENT_DATETIME, COALESCE(#{useAt}, 'Y') )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNADMINSUMMARYSNAPSHOT SET SNAPSHOT_JSON = #{snapshotJson}, SNAPSHOT_TYPE = #{snapshotType}, SOURCE_UPDATED_AT = CASE WHEN #{sourceUpdatedAt} IS NULL OR #{sourceUpdatedAt} = '' THEN SOURCE_UPDATED_AT ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{sourceUpdatedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END, LAST_COMPUTED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME, USE_AT = COALESCE(#{useAt}, USE_AT) WHERE SNAPSHOT_KEY = #{snapshotKey}
